name: qa-workflow
description: End-to-end QA testing workflow plugin: analyze requirements → create test cases → prepare test data → review quality → execute tests → generate reports

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new QA test project

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze requirements and identify test scope

agents.name: qa-engineer
agents.description: QA Engineer persona - executor of testing workflow

agents.name: qa-lead
agents.description: QA Lead persona - quality reviewer and approver

skills.name: test-data-management
skills.description: Organize and structure test data efficiently

skills.name: coverage-review
skills.description: Validate test case quality and completeness

skills.name: execution-reporting
skills.description: Guide test execution and generate insights
